title: 12 Months to $1 Million
author: Ryan Daniel Moran
subline: Revenue is the scoreboard of the business.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- An exponential growth curve sweeping from bottom-left to top-right. The endpoint dot is RED and 5x the size — $1M. -->
  <g fill="none" stroke-width="3">
    <!-- Baseline (the year axis) -->
    <line x1="126" y1="1200" x2="1474" y2="1200" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <!-- Vertical axis on left -->
    <line x1="126" y1="200" x2="126" y2="1200" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <!-- Gridlines: 6 horizontal hairlines -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4">
      <line x1="126" y1="350" x2="1474" y2="350"/>
      <line x1="126" y1="500" x2="1474" y2="500"/>
      <line x1="126" y1="650" x2="1474" y2="650"/>
      <line x1="126" y1="800" x2="1474" y2="800"/>
      <line x1="126" y1="950" x2="1474" y2="950"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Month tick marks along the baseline -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1">
      <line x1="234" y1="1200" x2="234" y2="1212"/><line x1="342" y1="1200" x2="342" y2="1212"/>
      <line x1="450" y1="1200" x2="450" y2="1212"/><line x1="558" y1="1200" x2="558" y2="1212"/>
      <line x1="666" y1="1200" x2="666" y2="1212"/><line x1="774" y1="1200" x2="774" y2="1212"/>
      <line x1="882" y1="1200" x2="882" y2="1212"/><line x1="990" y1="1200" x2="990" y2="1212"/>
      <line x1="1098" y1="1200" x2="1098" y2="1212"/><line x1="1206" y1="1200" x2="1206" y2="1212"/>
      <line x1="1314" y1="1200" x2="1314" y2="1212"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The exponential curve, twelve segments. From 12 to 0. Expressed via Bézier, but redrawn piecewise. -->
    <path d="M 150 1180 Q 350 1170 500 1150 T 800 1000 T 1100 700 T 1350 280" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="3"/>
    <!-- 12 monthly dots along the curve (subtle, ash) -->
    <g fill="#cccccc">
      <circle cx="170" cy="1178" r="4"/><circle cx="280" cy="1170" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="400" cy="1158" r="4"/><circle cx="540" cy="1130" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="700" cy="1070" r="4"/><circle cx="850" cy="970" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="990" cy="830" r="4"/><circle cx="1110" cy="660" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="1210" cy="490" r="4"/><circle cx="1290" cy="350" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="1340" cy="280" r="4"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Final dot = $1M. Red. Big. The target. -->
    <circle cx="1350" cy="270" r="22" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Red whisper label -->
    <text x="1370" y="250" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="22" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.06em">$1,000,000</text>
    <!-- Origin whisper -->
    <text x="150" y="1230" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">MONTH 01 · $0</text>
    <text x="1370" y="1230" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">MONTH 12</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: The book is a revenue curve, so the cover IS the curve. A 12-month exponential sweep from $0 to a red $1M dot, axis lines + month tick marks below. Title '12 Months to $1 Million' lives below the chart in 320px weight 500, asserting 'this is the goal.'
